title: Vantom

moves.title: Dismember
effects: Add 3 Wounds to your discard pile

move_pattern: Cycles through Ink Blot → Inky Lance → Dismember → Prepare, then repeats
notes: Vantom features progressive charging mechanics throughout the battle. Each move triggers charge-up animations and music parameter updates that progress through different animation states. The monster cycles through a consistent pattern of damage, multi-hit attacks, wound generation, and self-buffing.
